info.name: CMS API Collection
info.description:
Card Management System API - Spring Boot REST API with Card and Request Management

**Features:**
- No Authentication Required
- Loosely Coupled Architecture (Service Layer + Repository Interfaces)
- No Transaction Management
- Comprehensive Logging Enabled
- PostgreSQL Database Backend
- Card Expiry stored as Month and Year only

**Base URL:** http://localhost:8080

**Available Endpoints:**
- Card Management (10 endpoints)
- Card Request Management (10 endpoints)

**Status Codes:**
- Card Status: IACT (Inactive), CACT (Active), DACT (Deactivated)
- Request Status: PEND (Pending), APPR (Approved), RJCT (Rejected)
- Request Types: ACTI (Activation), CDCL (Card Close)

item.name: Card Management

request.description:
Retrieve all cards in the system.

**Response:** Returns a list of all cards ordered by last update time (most recent first).

**No authentication required.**
Retrieve a specific card by its card number. No authentication required.
Get cards by status (IACT=Inactive, CACT=Active, DACT=Deactivated). No authentication required.
Retrieve all expired cards. No authentication required.

query.description: Number of days to check for expiration

request.description: Get cards expiring within specified number of days. No authentication required.
Get count of cards, optionally filtered by status. No authentication required.

Create a new card in the system.

**Required Fields:**
- cardNumber: 16-digit card number
- expiryMonth: Card expiry month (1-12)
- expiryYear: Card expiry year (4-digit year, current or future)
- cardStatus: Card status code (IACT, CACT, or DACT)
- creditLimit: Credit limit amount
- cashLimit: Cash limit amount
- availableCreditLimit: Available credit limit
- availableCashLimit: Available cash limit

**No authentication required.**
Update an existing card. No authentication required.
Update only the status of a card. No authentication required.

item.description:
Card Management API - CRUD operations for cards.

**Operations:**
- View all cards or filter by status
- Get card details by card number
- Find expired or expiring cards
- Create and update cards
- Update card status
- Get card count by status

**Card Status Codes:**
- IACT: Inactive
- CACT: Active
- DACT: Deactivated

item.name: Card Request Management

request.description:
Retrieve all card requests in the system.

**Response:** Returns a list of all card requests ordered by creation time (most recent first).

**No authentication required.**
Retrieve a specific request by ID. No authentication required.
Get all requests for a specific card. No authentication required.
Get requests by status (PEND=Pending, APPR=Approved, RJCT=Rejected). No authentication required.
Get requests by type (ACTI=Activation, CDCL=Card Close). No authentication required.
Retrieve all pending requests. No authentication required.
Get count of requests, optionally filtered by status. No authentication required.

Create a new card request.

**Required Fields:**
- cardNumber: Card number (must exist in system)
- requestReasonCode: Request type (ACTI or CDCL)
- remark: Optional remark or notes

**Request Types:**
- ACTI: Card Activation
- CDCL: Card Close

**Note:** Request status is automatically set to PEND (Pending).

**No authentication required.**

Approve or reject a pending card request.

**Required Fields:**
- requestStatusCode: New status (APPR or RJCT)
- remark: Optional approval/rejection notes

**Constraints:**
- Only PENDING requests can be processed
- Cannot modify already approved/rejected requests

**Status Codes:**
- APPR: Approved
- RJCT: Rejected

**No authentication required.**

item.description:
Card Request Management API - Operations for card activation and closure requests.

**Operations:**
- View all requests or filter by status/type/card
- Get request details by ID
- Create new card requests
- Approve or reject requests
- Get request count by status

**Request Status Codes:**
- PEND: Pending
- APPR: Approved
- RJCT: Rejected

**Request Type Codes:**
- ACTI: Card Activation
- CDCL: Card Close
